programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Told against the sweeping panoramas of the Sahara desert, this epic features an exotic mix of action, suspense, and romance and delivers a caravan of excitement - with screen icons John Wayne and Sophia Loren fighting to survive an arduous journey!

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: George is a retired soccer pro whose glory days are behind him. Burnt out on his playboy lifestyle and bankrupted by a string of bad investments, he moves back to Virginia to reconnect with his estranged ex-wife and neglected son.

programme.title: Getting Even With Dad
programme.desc: Macaulay Culkin is a clever kid out to reform his small-time crook father (Ted Danson) in this exuberantly zany and heartwarming comedy for the whole family.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: The Astral Factor
programme.desc: A police detective (Robert Foxworth) with a joking wife (Stefanie Powers) tries to catch a strangler who can make himself invisible.

programme.title: Erik The Viking
programme.desc: Erik the Viking and his men travel across the sea to find Valhalla to ask the gods to end the Age of Ragnarok.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Judge Travis presides over an exasperating trial that hits close to home for Nathan.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: The Seven try to stop the abuse of Chinese laborers working railroad construction.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When J.D. kills a man trying to rob the bank, one of his stray bullets accidentally kills an innocent woman.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: It was a classic motion picture. Now the adventure of the big-screen Old West comes to television, in the tale of seven men committed to one cause.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.title: Triple Cross: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: Sky Kids
programme.desc: As a pair of schoolboys sneak a look around an empty private aircraft, two criminals take off with the kids still inside. Upon discovering the men are dangerous gangsters, the horrified lads inadvertently become embroiled in the mobsters's scheme.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Spring Break Nightmare
programme.desc: It centers on a pro surfer who gets kidnapped for a gambling debt.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Starring Laura Prepon and Naomi Judd. 10 years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again. Based on the novel by Iris Johansen.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Fighting The Sky
programme.desc: Researchers track down the origin of other-worldly sounds.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney is the awkward and insecure manager of Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium, the strangest, most fantastic, most wonderful toy store in the world.

programme.title: Toys & Pets
programme.desc: A group of toy sidekicks that are good-luck charms for tea drinkers-embark on a magical animated adventure to find a fabled mystic.

programme.title: The Frog Prince
programme.desc: A young British girl journeys to Paris to go to college, and is determined to find the man of her dreams and fall madly in love. However, things don't work out quite the way she planned.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo is in a difficult situation; Mark is forced to face the toughest job of his career.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo hits the midpoint of a four-day journey hauling 34 tons of building equipment.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi's reputation hangs by a thread after the biggest week of his entire career.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Russell faces a nightmare in the outback when a track collapses under his rig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran Dennis Dent faces a life-long nemesis. Christian takes on the wild back country.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: Transylvania 6-5000

programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: After Sara is abducted by the 'Miniature Killer', the CSIs must search the desert for her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs work with the FBI to investigate the murders of a young boy and a woman.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a freshman at uni brings Sara back in contact with an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges presents the 'lab rats' with a series of hypothetical murders.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates after a cowboy is found dead at a rodeo and his girlfriend is killed

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: Scorpion: Keep It In Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter and Sylvester enter an international chess competition undercover on foreign soil for Team Scorpion in order to extricate a U.S. spy before her identity is exposed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: When a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry, Team Scorpion must save Happy, Sylvester and Cabe, who begin suffering from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations.

programme.title: Scorpion: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Following a severe storm, Happy's friend Ada, who lives in a sterile bubble to protect her compromised immune system, is left with dangerous debris on the verge of puncturing the structure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate a rare endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Broken Wind
programme.desc: While on a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm, Team Scorpion must race to save Paige and Happy before the cable holding the gondola they are in snaps and sends them plummeting to the ground.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must defy the orders of a foreign government after they retrieve an asteroid from space containing DNA strands that could have deadly consequences once exposed.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A storybook stable boy turns pirate and rescues his beloved, who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: The Man in the Sky
programme.desc: The action follows a test pilot John Mitchell and his efforts to save not only his family, but his life too.

programme.title: Cage of Gold
programme.desc: A young bride believes that her husband has been killed. After a suitable period of mourning, she re-marries, only for her supposedly dead husband to return and attempt to extort money from her.

programme.title: Brighton Rock

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns

programme.title: Digging For Britain

programme.desc: When Matlock returns to his hometown, he ends up defending an accused murderer and becoming the town’s worst enemy.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The DeLorean made history on screen. Off screen, the rise and fall of John DeLorean’s company is a story with more twists and turns than any Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Acer just two years, GM was ready to kill the CorveKe. But a rogue group of engineers defied orders, working in secret on what would become America’s Sports Car.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Every car line has an iconic year — the ’57 Chevy, the ’69 Camaro, and of course the ’89 Batmobile, a revoluGonary model inspired by — and nearly destroyed by — Tim Burton.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: When the US military needed a stronger, tougher tactical vehicle, the answer was the Hummer. But could it survive Beverly Hills? With Schwarzenegger at the wheel, it just might.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Meyers Manx Dune Buggy was a garage-built experiment turned cultural icon. But would the surfer success story drown in a flood of copycats?

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Factory opGons offered drivers the comforts of home. While the cupholder was a home run, there were plenty of head-scratchers, from record players to dashboard coffee pots.

programme.title: Mike Mignola: Drawing Monsters
programme.desc: When Mike Mignola created Hellboy, he unleashed a visionary comic book character and launched an entire universe populated by unique heroes, misfits and monsters.

programme.title: The Salt of the Earth
programme.desc: Wim Wenders doc on the photographer Sebastiao Salgado and his work.

programme.title: Every Thing Will Be Fine
programme.desc: One day, driving aimlessly around the outskirts of town after a trivial domestic quarrel, a writer named Tomas accidentally hits and kills a child. Will he be able to move on?

programme.title: Our Little Sister
programme.desc: A story that revolves around three sisters who live in their grandmother's home and the arrival of their 13-year-old half sister.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Let Them Eat Pretzels
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey find what should be a simple hit-and-run accident becomes deeply complicated when the son of a diplomat becomes involved. The team must figure out how to arrest the son, while the father attempts to stop them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gang's All There
programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Cry For Help
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are assigned to investigate a wife-beating case and discover that the victim's husband is a cop and former classmate of Lacey's. Meanwhile the team also has to find a way to charge a con man after they are forced to let him go.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Informant
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey run into an issue with their drug investigation when it turns out that their teenage informant is a perpetrator of the crimes himself. They are then faced with the dilemma of releasing a one criminal in order to arrest another.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Matinee
programme.desc: When a missing housewife turns up dead, her husband enlists the help of the 14th precinct to solve her murder. As Cagney and Lacey investigate, they discover that the woman is from Cagney's hometown, revealing a glimpse into Cagney's past.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Up, Up And A Koopa/7 Continents For 7 Koopas
programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Oh Brother/Mighty Plumber
programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Robo Koopa
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have ventured to Robo Land in pursuit of King Koopa, whom they had intended to stop.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Fire of Hercufleas

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Do The Koopa/Kootie Pie Rocks
programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario Meets Koop-Zilla

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Eruption: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: In this gripping drama, a scientist is convinced that a volcanic eruption is near. He attempts to tell others.

programme.title: Our World is on Fire

programme.title: Megafires: The Global Threat
programme.desc: Learn how ancient and newly-discovered fire prevention techniques help make communities fire resistant.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman addicted to shopping forces her granddaughter to sleep on piles of purchases and shower outside with a garden hose. A hoarder's fed up partner issues an ultimatum following a decade of empty promises.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: With more than 30 cats in the walls and ceilings, cat hoarder John faces charges of animal cruelty. Vivian's obsession has ruined her marriage.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Claudie's house is so messy, she lives in a homeless shelter. Cast out by her family, her husband has just sent her divorce papers.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: An armed thief breaks into the home of a woman who collects cars and electronics, threatening her mother and stealing some of her stash. The son of a Nazi SS member lives with his dog in a clutter-stuffed home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: The crew catch up on the progress of people featured in previous episode, including Augustine, Judi, Dennis and Nadene, and Bob and Deborah.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Terry's fridge is packed with dead cats, and she has another 50 live ones. Meanwhile, Adele's using a bucket for a bathroom and doing laundry in the pool in her garden.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If You Knew Nunu
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard

programme.desc: Nikki fears that Kim may have been switched at birth, and the Professor’s late uncle has a tough time resting in peace.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mama I Wanna Sing
programme.desc: Nikki and the handsome new Pastor of her church make beautiful music together.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Nikki’s new friend becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Et Tu Andell?
programme.desc: Nikki’s stress reaches the breaking point when Andell and Mel get cozy, while Professor Oglevee is courting the school’s gorgeous new dean

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: In Sickness And In Health
programme.desc: Nikki masquerades as a doctor, and T’s racy music video causes a campus controversy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 1
programme.desc: An old house in England’s West Midlands gives the Most Haunted team a night they will never forget.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Haden Hill House Part 2
programme.desc: The strange occurrences at Hayden Hill House switch up a gear as whatever is there seems now to be stalking the team with some terrifying results, at least for some of the crew it is proving too much.

programme.title: Most Haunted: The Old House

programme.title: Most Haunted: Keithley Bus Museum
programme.desc: Once an old foundry, this large old building houses vehicles from a bygone era that are said to still contain passengers whose destination has never ended.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ashley & Mike
programme.desc: For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Keyonnah & Bow Wow
programme.desc: Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 4 Unseen Moments

programme.title: Teen Mom: Looking for Love

programme.title: Teen Mom: How Many Chances?
programme.desc: Maci contemplates breaking up with her fiancé, while Farrah starts dating a new guy despite her family's disapproval. Meanwhile, Amber and Catelynn both face personal issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Fallout
programme.desc: Catelynn's family clashes over her choices while Amber and her fiancé come to blows. Farrah learns that dating isn't easy, and Maci struggles to balance motherhood and school.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Moving On
programme.desc: Amber and Gary's arguing finally reaches a boiling point, while Catelynn struggles to find a home when her mother moves away. Newly-single mum Maci has a change of heart.

programme.title: Teen Mom: A Little Help
programme.desc: Catelyn chooses adoption during a weekend retreat with other birth mums, while Maci and Ryan reach out for help. Farrah wonders if she should stay home more with her baby.

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Daughter Told Me You Cheated!
programme.desc: Tammy suspects her husband Johnnie is sleeping with Renee and is Robert listening to his sister and cheating on his teen fiancée Raven? Plus, did Tom sleep with his best friend’s wife Angela? Marriages are on cliff’s edge today!

programme.title: The Maury Show: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Test Doesn't Lie…Today You Are Busted!

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.desc: Jim is hot on the tail of a speeding motorcyclist.

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 3
programme.desc: Kev goes on drugs busts accompanied by rookie Pete.

programme.desc: A nasty street fight leads to a taser being drawn.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Episode 2
programme.desc: Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist in trouble turns out to be someone he knows.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Scattered across the warm South China Sea, Indonesia’s islands are a melting pot for evolution and diversity. Here, rich forests, rivers and coastlines have offered pockets of isolation, enabling animals to develop incredible behaviours and looks.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rocket Dog's pregnancy causes problems for Sophie. And rover Lonestar Helps the Aztecs find a new home.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. A perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures. /Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: One of the most extraordinary forests in the world grows on top of volcanic cones, between rocks and ashes.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With the family split having become permanent, Rocket Dog's Whiskers loses Zaphod and a large group of males.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rocket Dog's pups are left vulnerable when sitters Sophie and Axel are distracted by Wilson's roving antics.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait and Switch

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: True Identity
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Match Point

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Menehune Mischief
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits - Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers - the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mister Mom
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gangsta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist

programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Going Si-ral
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4

programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode investigates the claim that there is an alien presence already on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The RAF’s maritime role is often overlooked. Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far flung corners of the Empire.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49. As well as flying round-the-clock operations into the airport, Sunderland flying boats delivered supplies by landing on Lake Havel near the city.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: In this programme we bring the RAF story into the modern era. Another aircraft to have extended the RAF’s capabilities is the C130 Hercules. This aircraft has proved its capabilities in countless environments from resupply, to dropping paratroopers.

programme.title: NEW: The Siege of Malta
programme.desc: At last here is the definitive story of heroism and hardship of a people uniquely and collectively awarded the George Cross 'for gallantry', and told by some of the heroic survivors.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Hitler's last secret is revealed: a sprawling underground headquarters at Książ Castle, complete with a spectacular network of underground complexes in the Owl Mountains. Was this intended to be the birthplace of Hitler’s ultimate superweapon?

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts
programme.desc: Paranoid and isolated, Albanian dictator Enver Hoxha establishes his bunkerization project, which would result in the construction of more than 170,000 bunkers, including the top secret HQ in Tirana, and a bunker city known as The Capital of War.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: A C-47 transport plane, with a crew of four, is ferrying 24 trainee P-47 fighter pilots from the Bruning Army Air Field in Nebraska to the South Dakotan Pierre Army Air Field for advanced training.

programme.title: Silver Spitfire: The Longest Flight
programme.desc: A British expeditionary team attempt a dangerous, world-first circumnavigation of the Earth in an 80-year-old vintage World War II fighter to inspire a new generation through the freedom of flight.

programme.title: Arthur: Around the World in 11 Minutes/Muffy and the Big Bad Blog
programme.desc: Pal, Baby Kate, Amigo, and Mei Lin enthusiastically accept Nemo's dare to travel around the world and make it back in 11 minutes. Then, Muffy discovers that web blogging is a great way to keep her readers up to date with her every move.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team
programme.desc: In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?

programme.title: Arthur: Caught in the Crosswires/Framed
programme.desc: Muffy is thrilled when mega producer J3 chooses her family for his latest reality TV project. After all, she was born to be star! Buster has just won the best young artist award at the Elwood City Arts Festival.

programme.title: Arthur: Based on a True Story (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: There's a new kid in town: Ladonna Compson, the Louisiana native with the gift of gab. Ladonna charms Arthur and friends with her amazing "true" stories. But are her stories really fact…or fiction?

programme.title: Arthur: The Blizzard/The Rat Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: A blizzard comes to town, taking out the electricity and sending residents scrambling for supplies. Can neighbors find ways to help each other survive through the storm? Then, the unthinkable is happening...Arthur's teacher is moving in!

programme.title: Arthur: The Pageant Pickle/Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Arthur: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma!
programme.desc: When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Blankie/Arthur's Substitute Teacher Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. has one little secret--her blankie. When it mysteriously disappears, Arthur is pressed into service. Find that blankie--or else! Next, the unbelievable has happened--Mr. Ratburn has gotten sick. And who's going to be the substitute?

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and they start to obey it.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When the last jar of chocolate spread they were fighting over sinks to the bottom of the river, Grizzy and the Lemmings have no choice but to dive in to recover it. But to their great surprise, they discover you can't breathe in water.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzly hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale; instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: In a casing that fell from a circus caravan, the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly calls upon his fishing instincts to seduce the she-bear, but only succeeds in making a fool of himself. When he sees the Lemmings riding a magnificent wild salmon like rodeo cowboys, he tries to steal theirs.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's teddy bear goes missing.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie becomes a were-dog in the middle of the night and eats lasagna. But Jon thinks that Garfield ate it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield visit Jon's farmer brother, Doc Boy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield gets rejected from The Pet Show because he's too fat to enter so then Odie takes his place and competes against Nermal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield fight against watching the TV so that they go on a TV show called Pet Matchers.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield gets rich after a Leprechaun gives him some good luck.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie digs up some bones, but they aren't ordinary bones. They're Brachiosaurus bones.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon decides to buy a cleaning robot because of Garfield and Odie's filthiness. The robot soon becomes very violent around Garfield, Odie and Jon.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon puts Garfield on a diet and forces him to exercise, when the scales tell him that he's overweight.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has difficulty sleeping, so a hypnotist puts Jon under hypnosis making him fall asleep from the noise of a horn, but he accidentally responds to Odie's bark instead.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally gets sent into a parallel world; Garfield gets a taste of celebrity and glitter.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are framed for stealing barbecued ribs when they run away from Jon's twin girl cousins.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The `campers' go to med-school to cram all night for today's medical episode. Will they be able to get they answers right without getting shocked?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and his friends are approached by a civil engineer with a problem: she has a team of Ground-type Pokémon working to build a tunnel, but they're terrified of the water that keeps leaking in! Can our heroes help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Aboard a luxury blimp, Team Rocket are trying to pinch a few valuables from wealthy travelers—but some courageous Kecleon are on hand to get the better of them!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Misty finally meets one of her idols, a Nurse Joy who specializes in Water types! But the reality doesn’t live up to the dream when Nurse Joy reveals that she doesn't share Misty’s love for aquatic Pokémon after all…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and his friends have one last obstacle before Olivine City: a scorching desert! And when Cyndaquil goes missing, they have more than the heat to deal with!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash’s next Gym battle is under way, but it's soon called off by Jasmine, the real Olivine Gym Leader, who claims that Ash has been battling an impostor! Will Ash now get the challenge he’s been searching for?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After receiving the medicine in Cianwood City, our heroes soon discover the Gym Leader training hard with his Machoke. It's only a matter of time before Ash decides to go toe to toe with Chuck’s Fighting-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: In a scuffle with Team Rocket, Ash and friends are thrown from the ship bearing them to the Whirl Islands! Can they escape the powerful whirlpools that threaten to drag them down?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Pidgey on a protected island don’t have to worry about being attacked, so most have lost interest in flying. But one of them still dreams of soaring beyond the stars! Can Ash and friends help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes pass a small mountain village just in time for the annual Chinchou migration. The village always sends Trainers to protect the Chinchou on their journey—but will they be enough to stop Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a family’s home is threatened by the Corsola who live nearby, it’s Ash and friends to the rescue…and maybe Misty can finally catch that Corsola she’s been after!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After our heroes miss a ferry, they meet a diver who offers to take them to the next island…but they’re soon distracted by tales of treasure aboard a sunken ship!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies play a bumping bottoms game. They stop to watch some children play some ball games. Laa-Laa’s ball goes in a puddle, she tries to get it back but can’t reach it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children go on a boat trip to see some seals. Tinky Winky is wondering what everyone is doing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are very, very happy. They watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some two children look for fox cubs. Tinky Winky falls asleep in bed, Dipsy falls asleep at the table, Laa-Laa falls asleep on the slide and Po falls asleep on the scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love dancing, but they love children even more. So everything stops when they watch some children painting in a most unusual way. Back at the house, a trail leads Tinky Winky all around Teletubbyland to find out.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1911, a gun battle on the streets of London, The Siege of Sidney Street the first breaking-news story in history.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Jack the Ripper. The most famous serial killer in history, we reveal the true lives of the five women slain.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: To Eat or Not to Eat/S.W.E.A.T.
programme.desc: A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur: No Acting Please/Prunella Deegan and the Disappointing Ending
programme.desc: When Fern lands a role in a community production, she fears she's not talented enough to be a star. Finally, the final volume of the Henry Screever series is out. Prunella and Marina compete to see who can finish the book the fastest.

programme.title: Arthur: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap
programme.desc: After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur: Tales of Grotesquely Grim Bunny/Pet Projects
programme.desc: When the comic book store changes owners, the new darker comics are right up Fern's alley, but Arthur can't seem to stomach them. Arthur and Francine enter their pets to compete against each other in the "Perfect Pet" video contest.

programme.title: Arthur: I'm A Poet/The Scare-Your-Pants-Off Club
programme.desc: Challenged by Fern to enter a poetry contest, Arthur and his friends each write a poem to be judged by the famous poet Jack Prelutsky. Then, Arthur and his friends develop a consuming passion for the Scare-Your-Pants-Off books.

programme.title: Arthur: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea
programme.desc: Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?

programme.title: Arthur: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
