programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Bully for Binky/Misfortune Teller
programme.desc: Is Binky Barnes really the most disgusting, nasty, horrible person on the planet, or is he just misunderstood? Next, what's got four sides and the answer to everything? Prunella's cootie catcher!

programme.title: Arthur: All About D.W./Blockheads
programme.desc: When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.title: Arthur: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids
programme.desc: Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat/What's in a Name?
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?
programme.desc: Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Real Snow Job
programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder to set up a special lens that will focus the sun's rays to create a devastating heat ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder decide to use Ireland as their base for the Technodrome. With a device called the Rainbow Trans-Charmer, the villains intend to turn harmless little creatures like sheep and rabbits into slavering beasts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword
programme.desc: In Dimension X Krang is using a long-range scanner and discovers a rare metal buried in a ruined castle in England. The metal turns out to be King Arthur's legendary sword, Excalibur.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express
programme.desc: April is covering the revival of the Orient Express. Shredder is on the train with Rocksteady and Bebop carrying the supercharger, a device to accelerate the train to super speed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Near Mt. Mortar, our heroes run into a Trainer who is trying to curb a Tyrogue's wild ways. But when Team Rocket gets involved, will they be able to save the troublesome Tyrogue from the villains' clutches?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a young girl watching over a group of Xatu, whose psychic powers let them predict the future of a local village. When the villagers begin doubting their warnings, can the Xatu prove the truth of their visions?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Reaching the Lake of Rage, Pikachu and Togepi begin to feel sick, and our heroes are attacked by an enraged red Gyarados. When Team Rocket appears on the scene, things look a lot more dangerous for Ash and friends…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Things look bad for our heroes, who have been captured by Team Rocket at the Lake of Rage. With the fate of the world's Pokémon at stake, can Ash rise to the occasion and save the day?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Finally reaching Mahogany Town, Ash is warming up for his next Gym battle. But after getting the cold shoulder from Gym Leader Pryce, can our hero convince his frosty opponent to give him a chance?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Pryce and Ash are about to clash in a cold contest in the Mahogany Town Gym. Will Ash be able to show what he and his Pokémon are made of and earn his seventh Johto region Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter battling groups of Bellossom and Vileplume, who have only recently evolved. As each group fights with increasing number and intensity, can our heroes put an end to the quarrelling?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The heat is rising in our heroes' journey when Misty and her Water-type Pokémon go head to head with a willful Fire-type Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and the gang bump into a Pokémon magician, and soon they're on the hunt to find components for her greatest spell yet!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After yet another close encounter with Team Rocket, Pikachu is left exhausted and weak. Thankfully, a passerby takes our heroes to a nearby lake that helps recharge Electric types…but also hides a great secret!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes take time out to enjoy the entertainment of a young Trainer and her Igglybuff variety act. But it's not long before Team Rocket arrives and tries to steal the show!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children mixing water, paint and washing up liquid to make bubble pictures. Po shows us how to make Tubby Custard before running off to watch three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up to say "Eh-oh", and then run off to watch two children go for a ride in a hovercraft. The Teletubbies are very careful not to drop their Tubby blankets on the floor, but if they do, the Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Reality Bites Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee's new actor boyfriend tells her he's going to star in a new reality dating show and asks her to join in the fun. Things become difficult when Dee Dee realizes she must compete for his attention.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Stuck In The Middle Episode
programme.desc: Mona convinces Chase to hire Lorenzo as a pastry chef at City Sonoma. Chase becomes furious with Mona for not informing him that Lorenzo is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big What Have We Done Episode
programme.desc: After finding out her rival will be writing her six-month performance review for the agency, Dee Dee makes an effort to tighten up her relationship with Brett outside the office.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 1
programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.title: Ashwell Prison As Live Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 1
programme.desc: Yvette and the MH team travel to the oldest pub in Macclesfield, famous for ghost stories and strange occurrences. Whatever is there makes itself known quickly and violently.

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to investigate Macclesfield’s oldest pub and are soon under fire from poltergeist activity. Glen’s scepticism is put fully to the test.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 1
programme.desc: This old Welsh Castle pushes Yvette’s team of ghost hunters to the limit and at least one of them doesn’t make it to the end…but who? Strange noises and sinister shadows seem to create an atmosphere of foreboding throughout the night.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 2
programme.desc: The team continue their investigation into Ruthin Castle, as the activity gains momentum one of team is hit hard and has to leave, so the others go in search of whatever is there lurking…all is going well until they find it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Choices
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Summer Camp
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Inner Limits
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kirby
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Search
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Idonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Execution
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Play
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Cardinal
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Pucks for Bucks
programme.desc: The guys get stuck with a unit they didn't want and have to sort through trash to make their bottom line. They uncover glass blowing tools, autographed baseballs and a hockey puck launcher, which puts Ton in the line of fire.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net
programme.desc: Ton and Allen face their toughest challenge yet when two old rivals join forces. The guys dig up an off-road motorcycle and a pair of net guns, while the staff clashes with mystery shoppers back at Haff Ton Pawn.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Teen Mom: Family Bonds
programme.desc: Farrah contacts Sophia's dad's family in an attempt to get social security benefits. Maci tells Ryan she's moving to Nashville, and Catelynn and Tyler learn Butch is back in jail.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Lashing Out
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler learn they will not graduate on time. Farrah has an emotional reunion with Sophia's dad's sister for the first time since he died, and Amber lashes out at Gary.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Too Much Too Soon
programme.desc: Maci confronts Kyle when she sees her new life in Nashville isn't what she expected. Amber breaks up with Gary and starts dating. Farrah gets the results of Sophia's DNA test.

programme.title: Teen Mom: See You Later
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler have an emotional reunion with their daughter. Amber and Gary try to work out custody of Leah now that they are broken up, and Farrah's mum sets her up on a date.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Special episode in front of a studio audience. Maci, Farrah, Amber and Catelynn discuss their ups and downs, achievements and regrets. Last in the series.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?
programme.desc: Is Jesus the father of Laicie’s baby? Dusti says he’s gay and sex with Kayla was an “experiment”, but did he father her child? Is Rick or Jesse the father of Jolene’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!
programme.desc: Two steaming grandmothers want to sort out their children's paternity mystery. Then, Ben is sure that Angela's child is his. Teen mom Melissa wants Izzy to admit he's the dad and support her!

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women
programme.desc: These women are sure their lovers are cheating. Will these men be able to talk their way out of being busted on hidden camera?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hughes
programme.desc: Fundraiser Kay wants to raise 500 pounds to support people with spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Stedman
programme.desc: Gemma Stedman wants to raise funds to transfer her father's old home movies to DVD.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Quilter
programme.desc: Martin Quilter wants to sell his uncle's heirlooms to create a garden memorial for him.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you a 'social media lurker?' How often do you scroll through social media platforms to stare at other people's photos and videos and decide that person is surely living their best life, and you are not. A deep dive into posting: real vs fake.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What makes a good wife? Is it cooking, cleaning, raising the kids and having great sex? Dr. Phil says too few couples understand what it means to be a "Mrs." He delves into the role of the wife in 2005.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.desc: Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur: Paradise Lost/The Pride of Lakewood
programme.desc: Baby Kate is growing up! But strangely enough, the more words she learns, the less she seems to understand their dog. To boost school spirit, Arthur and his classmates form the Lakewood Pride Committee, but not everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog
programme.desc: The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric Red seizes both April and Professor Swenson's map to the underground volcanoes in Scandinavia to tap into the molten energy and melt the polar ice caps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Elementary, My Dear Turtle
programme.desc: The Turtles are in England, when they are taken back to the past, via an experimental atomic clock and must team up with Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in order to get the clock back and return to the present.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Dark Turtle
programme.desc: When Donatello receives a jolt of electrical energy, he undergoes a radical personality transformation, turning into 'The Dark Turtle', a psychotic caped crimefighter on a mission of revenge against Shredder!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Starchild
programme.desc: The Turtles face a crisis of galactic proportions when they must play babysitter to an alien infant with incredible powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Legend of Koji
programme.desc: The Turtles take an incredible trip back in time when they follow Shredder back to 16th Century Japan, where they join forces with Splinter's ancestor, the youthful samurai koji, and help him found the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Convicts from Dimension X
programme.desc: Donatello, tinkering with his InterDimensional Early Warning System device, accidently frees two vicious convicts from their maximum security cell on Dimension X, bringing them to earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): White Belt, Black Heart
programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues
programme.desc: Determined to stop the turtles once and for all, Shredder enlists some of the most memorable villains from past episodes into an army of 'rogues'!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Just as Grizzly was about to coat a nice big fresh salmon with chocolate spread and snuggle up in front of the TV, he discovers that the pantry is empty.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: By chance, Grizzly discovers that the ranger's new robot vacuum cleaner also gives very pleasant back massages.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A chance trip to a SlowPoké temple gives our heroes an opportunity to seek enlightenment…and gives Team Rocket the chance to lighten some pockets!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A lavish celebrity event inspires Jessie and James to pretend to be the VIPs and fill their rumbling tummies. But it's not long before their disguises are put to the test by the real guest of honor: Professor Oak!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When our heroes spot an object falling from the night sky, they rush to investigate. Soon, they find themselves joining forces with a Pokémon mystery club to uncover the secrets shared by the fallen Cleffa and the stars above!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and Misty get into an argument over who can take on a powerful Trainer and his Poliwrath. When he accepts both challenges, the tough battles that follow give Misty some ideas for her own Poliwhirl!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Hearing of a nearby amusement park for battling, Ash is eager to test his skills. But the Team Rocket trio have recently joined the park, and they have a few ideas in store to test this Trainer's mettle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity for Misty's Politoed when it gets roped into replacing the leader of a Pokémon Cheer team...but where has the other Politoed gone?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Blackthorn City, Ash meets Gym Leader Clair, who is busy training her Dratini for a ceremony. But Team Rocket has other plans for the Dragon-type Pokémon, and Ash and Clair must work together to stop them!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Facing off against Blackthorn Gym Leader Clair, Ash is finding it difficult to overcome the power of her Dragon-type Pokémon. Things are harder still when Team Rocket shows up to steal Blackthorn City's prized Dragon Fang relic!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Team Rocket has taken the Blackthorn City Dragon Fang and holed up deep within the Dragon's Den. Things look bad for the ancient relic, but help comes in the form of an old friend!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies lobe to play peek-a-boo. The Teletubbies watch some children painting pictures. When a book appears in Teletubbyland, something magic happens when Dipsy turns the pages.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children taking photographs of each other's faces. Dipsy has a good look around Teletubbyland when a telescope appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po jumps out from behind Tinky Winky and they run off to watch Andy Brown and some children looking for creatures. They find some woodlice under a log.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song to Dipsy and Po, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky has no time for Tubby Custard before watching some children feed some baby penguins. The Lion & Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk about Teletubbyland in a huddle, before watching a little girl with lots of puppies. Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep and comes to Teletubbyland to find them.

programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Idonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty: Samantha
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior.Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: Danny
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty: Madness
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty: Two Flights to Haiti
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Cardinal
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Elixir
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Exchange
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Trading Places
programme.desc: When an injury sidelines Allen, he stays at the shop while Ton takes Big Sis to the auction and goes rogue, ignoring Allen's advice and making risky purchases that could lose the partners a boatload of cash.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Catch My Drift?
programme.desc: The guys land a custom drift car and a luxury antiques unit that could have a one-of-a-kind pilot pistol from WWI. While trying to track down the provenance of the gun, Ton's lead foot gets them into trouble at their car sale.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: An auction in Allen's old stomping grounds triggers memories of being a "lone wolf." The guys find a set of RC race boats and when they buy a man-cave unit full of old whiskey, a night of partying leads to some tough sales.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Catch Up Special

programme.title: Teen Mom: Unseen Moments

programme.title: Teen Mom: Baby Talk

programme.title: Teen Mom: Taking It Slow
programme.desc: Maci confronts her ex about child support; Amber makes a choice; Catelynn and Tyler consider living together; and Farrah considers a big change.

programme.title: Teen Mom: To Be With You
programme.desc: Amber and Gary move in together; Tyler's family questions his decision; Maci considers letting her boyfriend move in; Farrah struggles with the separation.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?
programme.desc: Today on Maury, we've got steaming mad mommas and daddies in denial. But could some of these men be right? What if they really aren't the father? Only Maury has the answers!

programme.title: The Maury Show: We'll Prove You're My Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: Kreisha and Jonathan's mom wants to prove to him that he fathered her baby. Plus, Brooke and Wade's relationship began as a teenage romance, but ends with a paternity test!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Where Did My Man Learn New Sex Moves?
programme.desc: Has pregnant Kazia's fiancé been cheating on her and selling his body? Then, has Deanna been cheating on Manny? Who fathered her child?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Fiance Sleep With My Uncle for Money?
programme.desc: Did Ray cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome? Then, is Jason's fiancé Tasha sleeping with his own uncle Sonny for money?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 3 Mad Moms... 4 Babies... Is Aaron the Dad?
programme.desc: Travis swears that Crystal cheated and denies their daughter. Shamika's fiancée wants him to take a DNA test to prove that he fathered their three kids!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1

programme.desc: Valerie says daughter, Alyssa, 19, is a lazy mom refusing to get a job & falls asleep on the couch, leaving her baby unattended. And actor Antonia Sabato Jr. discusses his campaign for a new law banning medical marijuana in homes with children under 18.

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: Neil Armstrong: One Small Step
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland
programme.desc: Wild Hungary - A Water Wonderland is a wildlife documentary about a white-tailed eagle family, a young otter and a giant catfish that share the wetlands of this country in Europe.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Some of the forests with most character in the world are the juniper woods. Each juniper tree has its own shape. Juniper woodlands are open and adapted to the cold and dry climates.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: In Northern Africa and Southern Europe, there are forests that grow only on the highest mountain peaks, unique ecosystems of singular beauty that are home to a variety of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: In the northern hemisphere, forests are adapted to the extreme seasonality of very cold winters and hot, humid summers.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Thailand – The Wild Heart
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Yet they have evolved into some of the most iconic and successful species on the planet.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: Dr Suzannah Lipscomb enters Henry VIII's pleasure palace.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: The hosts arrive as the Great Fire almost wipes the city out.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: How the Crossrail will propel the capital into the future.

programme.desc: Orford Ness is a lens into an era of secrets and superpowers.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Shepton Mallet
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores this 400-year-old prison.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Greed is Good
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens and the Vatican

programme.desc: Alien Bodies: Uncover the shocking truth about alien remains as experts investigate unsettling reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs.

programme.desc: Erwin Rommel battles Allied forces in North Africa in 1942.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: North Africa (November 1942)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Burma: The Forgotten Front (Spring 1943)
programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Sicily
programme.desc: Fresh from victory in North Africa, the Allies successfully invade the island of Sicily, staging an eventual Italian withdrawal from the war.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Ploesti
programme.desc: American bombers target a Romanian oil refinery in a daring 1943 mission.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Monte Cassino (September 3, 1943)
programme.desc: As the allies make their way into Italy, they encounter tremendous resistance at German defensive positions along the Gustav line. One of these locations is an ancient monastery called Monte Cassino.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Anzio
programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Kwajalein
programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle in Palau (Summer 1944)
programme.desc: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: In our final episode, we examine how each Axis Power had troubles on their own home front, leading to disaster in the final days of the war.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Nazi Germany boasted that its locomotives were faster and more innovative. This programme examines that claim by looking at these ‘flying trains’.

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion

programme.title: Greatest Escapes of WWII

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers

programme.title: Bomber:Terror of WWII: War Without Boundaries
programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Combat Land
programme.desc: The Turtles are invited to be the first guests at combat Land, an amusement park where visitors fight a wide variety of robotic warriors from various historical eras.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder Triumphant!
programme.desc: The Turtles face their greatest challenge ever when they become trapped in Dimension X--while Shredder and Krang bring the Technodrome out of the ocean depths and at last conquer the city!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers a gadget that controls various functions in the cabin. He will finally be able to get rid of the Lemmings, without even leaving the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: To make sure that the Lemmings don't snatch his chocolate spread, Grizzy turns the fridge into a safe. However, the Lemmings see Grizzy open the door while sleepwalking.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have invented a new popcorn game which consists of throwing popcorn and catching it with their mouths.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy wants to learn to dance the mambo to please his lovely she-bear. He finds a learning kit at the ranger's home which has a dance carpet with footprints.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After receiving a terrible blow on the head, Grizzly thinks he's a rodent and tries to get the gang to adopt him.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is exhausted, and he goes to fetch a pillow and a sleeping mask, but the Lemmings have entirely different plans for the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers that the frenzied breakdance the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Another heat wave, and even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzly discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzy, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, Grizzly is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But Grizzly's luck is about to change.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy can't believe his eyes when he sees objects moving all by themselves. He soon realises it's the Lemmings who are playing around with a magnet.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through books of fairy tales, searching for a means to return his beloved to her original form, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzly melts and adopts the creature. When the Lemmings drag the baby into their dangerous games, the overprotective Grizzly steps in.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the pleasures of video games on the ranger's console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away while he prepares a party for his beloved she-bear. But his double's artificial intelligence leaves a lot to be desired.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly's she-bear is convinced she's a lemming after hitting her head. Grizzly believes another well-aimed hit will correct her thinking, but the Lemmings are thrilled to have a new playmate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Team Rocket has taken the Blackthorn City Dragon Fang and holed up deep within the Dragon's Den. Things look bad for the ancient relic, but help comes in the form of an old friend!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and Clair finally face off in a Gym battle that will push Ash's skills as a Trainer to the limit! Can he win his final Johto Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A Team Rocket trick takes all of Ash's hard-earned Johto Gym badges from him, but it's not long before the troublesome trio get a taste of their own medicine. What tricksy Pokémon could have beaten them at their own game?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Discovering a nearby Pokémon synchronized swim team, Misty goes to check it out, and soon finds herself heading below the surface to take on the team's Trainer in an exciting underwater battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash barely makes it back to New Bark Town before he is off again, retrieving a Pokémon Egg for Professor Elm. However, things get interesting when he meets an old friend and Team Rocket shows up with more mischief!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Professor Elm's Pokémon Egg hatches into a Larvitar! The Pokémon is unresponsive even after being checked over at the Pokémon Center, and Ash tries to cheer it up, but soon Team Rocket arrives to ruin all his hard work.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: On their way to Mt. Silver, our heroes relax at a hot spring and meet a young Trainer who's tracking the Legendary Pokémon Entei. Trouble arises when Team Rocket follows them with a plan to steal Pikachu and Larvitar!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes find a group of SlowPoké guarding a dried-up stream and hear the tale of a similar drought long ago, when one SlowPoké took the initiative to evolve into Slowking and save everyone. Can the same thing happen here?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: A cheeky Elekid starts to bother Larvitar, but soon both Pokémon are in the clutches of Team Rocket. Ash's rival Casey wants to catch Elekid for herself, but can they mount a rescue before the villains get away?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes have reached Mt. Silver, and Ash wastes no time starting his training for the Johto League Silver Conference. But all the Trainers around provide the perfect prey for Team Rocket, who arrive to swipe all the rare Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a frightened Unown transports our heroes to another dimension, they make some exciting discoveries about Larvitar!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun saying 'Boo! ' The Teletubbies watch some children riding on a bus when it gets washed. A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. There's time for one more dance before Tubby Bye Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children going for a walk to look for dandelion clocks to blow. Po decides to have a blowy day and has fun blowing at everything in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to watch children. Today, they see Ella and Lilly who tell us about their dog – called Alice. A dog appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All four Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies watch some children joining in with Debbie. Laa-Laa makes up a song, which makes the other Teletubbies run away.

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Jackie and Curtis have big dreams for their house but their budget may be too small; Contessa realizes her time in Nashville is hard on her family; things get ugly at a party thrown by Simone's friend; Toya hosts a get-together for her birthday.

programme.desc: Toya shocks the ladies with her idea for an art class; Heavenly decides not to tell Damon about Toya's explicit birthday party; while Simone and Cecil give the boys a safe-sex talk, Jackie does some sexual research for an exciting new project.

programme.desc: Ryan tries the buyers' patience while trying out a new pricing strategy for a downtown duplex; Fredrik promises a buyer something his developer may not be able to deliver; Luis and a new co-lister dig a hole for themselves.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik reunites with a former client in the Williamsburg neighborhood; Luis hopes to repair his rocky relationship with a rebellious co-lister; Ryan tackles an enormous townhouse that may be too big for most New Yorkers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A telephone call breathes new life into a development project, but it comes with a catch Fredrik never saw coming; Ryan bends over backward for a potential buyer but receives nothing in return; Luis gets first dibs on a hot new Tribeca building.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: For a new development in the NoHo neighborhood, Fredrik summons the spirit of a dead icon; after a failed shot, Luis chases down one of New York City's biggest developers; Ryan picks up a penthouse in the Flatiron District with a difficult co-lister.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan's relationship with his co-lister hangs by a thread, prompting him to try something new; Luis finds himself caught in the middle while trying to please a married couple; Fredrik hopes a rival will save him after the developer raises prices.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
